title: Wisil Heat Wave
lead: Wisil is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.20. This anomaly has reached a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Wisil has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), with a value of 17.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 32%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed of 23.3 km/h may provide some relief, but the overall conditions remain critical.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
